sent_simp: 他发来的报价比我们预期的低。
sent_trad: 他發來的報價比我們預期的低。
pinyin: Tā fā lái de bàojià bǐ wǒmen yùqī de dī.
english: The quote he sent was lower than we expected.

sent_simp: 她认了邻居阿姨当干妈，逢年过节都去拜访。
sent_trad: 她認了鄰居阿姨當乾媽，逢年過節都去拜訪。
pinyin: Tā rèn le línjū āyí dāng gànmā, féng nián guò jié dōu qù bàifǎng.
english: She took the neighbor auntie as her adoptive mother and visits every holiday.

sent_simp: 他通过提供劳务来赚取收入。
sent_trad: 他通過提供勞務來賺取收入。
pinyin: Tā tōngguò tígōng láowù lái zhuànqǔ shōurù.
english: He earns income by providing labor services.
